info.english_meaning: to worship to know to understand

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'guruvfdDApacAyinaH' (BA॰anu॰145.23) hInatvasampAdakA iti nIlakaRWaH atrApaSabdo naYarTe viralatamo'yaM cAyaDAtusahacaritasyApopasargasya prayogaH
pUjArTe tvasya prasidDiH- 'apacikIhi' (aTarva॰1.10.4) ityatra yaTA apacikIhIti yaNluki loRmaDyamEkavacane rUpam
'itastAH sarvA naSyantu kAkA apacitAmiva' (aTarva0 6251) apacitAM pUjitAM pativratAM striyam (prApya)
